title: CavesChaos: More Caves & Biomes
description: Explore dangerous new cavern systems across the Overworld. Greater challenges, unique loot, and total chaos await!
body:
![CavesChaos Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a218cb6dcaaecc9622e25c8a19df8b392b86da2d.png)

CavesChaos is a NeoForge mod for Minecraft that introduces unique cave biomes to the Overworld. Unlike standard terrain, these biomes are exceedingly rare subterranean destinations, each filled with a variety of custom blocks, items, mobs, and mechanics. Currently, the mod features the Rusty Pulse - a massive industrial wasteland hidden deep beneath the surface.

![CavesChaos Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02e79953738a3fd06629a97ea103d6cf4f260bd9.jpeg)
